title: [CI:DOCS] README.md: Add badges
body: Add badges for License, Latest Release and Go Report Card. Copied and modified from podman.

comments.body: Ack. This PR in particular is not really required by anyone AFAIK, just that it was there in podman and I basically thought `why not here`. I guess if the cost of advertizing turns out to be too high, we could remove it later. I'll defer to you.
